seo.title: Stop Losing Money to Overtime, Route Imbalances, and Dispatch Chaos — FAHRLY
seo.description: Built for Amazon DSPs and delivery fleet operators. Fahrly helps you balance workloads, reduce overtime, improve driver retention, and keep more routes on schedule.

hero.headline: Stop Losing Money to Overtime, Route Imbalances, and Dispatch Chaos
hero.subhead: Built for Amazon DSPs and delivery fleet operators. Fahrly helps you balance workloads, reduce overtime, improve driver retention, and keep more routes on schedule—without hiring more drivers.

pains:
Drivers Are Finishing Late And Overtime Is Eating Your Margins?
One overloaded route can trigger overtime pay, rescue routes, driver frustration, and lower profitability. Most dispatchers only discover problems after it's already too late.

Too Much Time Spent Managing Routes Manually?
Spreadsheets, WhatsApp messages, route changes, sick calls, vehicle issues. Every morning starts with dozens of decisions that depend on experience instead of data.

Good Drivers Are Hard To Keep?
Drivers who consistently receive unrealistic routes burn out faster, complain more often, and leave sooner. Replacing experienced drivers is expensive and disruptive.
problemSolution.solution: Fahrly helps delivery operators identify route imbalances, overtime risks, underutilized vehicles, and operational bottlenecks. See exactly where time, money, and driver productivity are being lost before problems impact your operation.

tiers.name: Operations
tiers.description: For growing fleets focused on reducing overtime and improving profitability.
